Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2014
programme.desc: The annual event to discover the nautical novelties of the coming season. A showcase of close to 785 exhibitors and 1,300 brands for an attendance of over 240,000 visitors, 1200 boats on display including nearly 200 new features!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Lee Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to the Lee Valley White Water Centre just outside London for the World Cup 1 of the ICF Canoe Slalom. We will be talking you through the action of this competition: it is going to be canoe single men followed by the kayak single women. Follow us for slalom competition at its highest level. Relive the best moments in Lee Valley 2019.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: Screen Heroes - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are in Ericeira in Portugal, Europe's first surfing reserve and a magnet for tourists and surfers from all over the world. While we enjoy the Portuguese sun before heading over to the festival, we leave you a preview of the first film: Otelo Burning, a South African drama that yields a different perspective from professional surfing. Let's dive in!

programme.title: Screen Heroes - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome back to Screen Heroes, the show that travels the globe and visits the most important surfing festivals in the world! We are in London, and before we find out more about the British surf scene we are going to check out the capital. Are you ready to see what London has in stock for us?

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this first episode of Inside Superyachts we meet with the Godfather of Superyacht builders – Feadship Yachts. Established in 1849, this Dutch shipyard is not only the number one in the industry but also the most famous of all superyacht builders, having created masterpieces for the likes of Steve Jobs.From the Netherlands we take a trip down to the ultra-discreet Principality of Monaco, host of the greatest yacht show in the world ‘The Monaco Yacht Show’. Then, we travel thousands of feet below the sea, exploring the vast ocean with Triton Submarines, utilized by some of films greatest names such as film director James Cameron and presenter David Attenborough.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 2
programme.desc: From the Godfather of builders to the Grandaddy of designers we visit the studio of Bannenberg & Rowell to unveil the legend that is the late great Jon Bannenberg. Following the winds of change we discuss the growing demand for explorer yachts. We meet London based H2 Design, and learn about the groundbreaking 107m explorer M/Y Ulysses.We continue our theme with EYOS Explorer and DAMEN yachts, the largest and most prolific ship builder on the planet.

programme.title: SSL Gold Cup - Ep.2- Highlight
programme.desc: SSL Gold Cup - Ep.2- Highlight

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 5 Sharjah, UAE
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the UAE for the traditional season-decider in Sharjah where the 2019 world championship will decide over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in all four categories: Ski Division GP1, Ski Ladies GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. This is the fifth UIM ABP Grand Prix in Sharjah, and more than seventy riders from around the world will compete. In this program, we'll bring you all the Ski Mens and Ladies action.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep5 - Kayaking the Okefenokee National Wildlife Refuge
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the alligator-filled waters of the 438,000 acre Okefenokee swamp in Georgia.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep6 - Great Family Adventure - West Virginia
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman & Emily Jackson and family set out on an adventure-filled road trip from Rock Island, Tennessee to West Virginia.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2014
programme.desc: The annual event to discover the nautical novelties of the coming season. A showcase of close to 785 exhibitors and 1,300 brands for an attendance of over 240,000 visitors, 1200 boats on display including nearly 200 new features!

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 4
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 4

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. The long sandy beaches and good weather conditions are placing Pingtan second most touristic island of China and if you combine its good winds, Pingtan makes perfect venue for Kiteboarding!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Welcome to The Boat Show, the best show in the world of boating for boat lovers and boating fans. Today we are on Lake Tellico, Tennessee, to try out the Mastercraft Xstar. Then, we move on to try the Island Packet 349, the American boat we've seen the most in Miami. Finally the Boat Show shows you one of the safest boats in the world, we are talking about the Ognitempo Classe 300. Find it out now!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this new episode of The Boat Show we fall in love with the new Princess V60, a luxury boat from Princess. Then, we will see how ZF Marine products are used on professional workboats, where reliability and durability is even more important. ZF is a multinational technology company with headquarters in Germany, however we decided to sail on a ferry in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode of Road to Bermuda, we celebrate International Woman’s Day by uncovering some of the most inspirational and influential ladies in sailing to date. We have plenty of action from the M32 series, and we watch as some of our favourite AC sailors are taken hostage by the pirates of Bermuda, on board the Spirit of Bermuda. Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode we catch up on the results from the World Series in Oman, go on a sailing adventure on the Spirit of Bermuda and get a windsurfing lesson with Upwind Sports. We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode we catch up on the results from the World Series in Oman, go on a sailing adventure on the Spirit of Bermuda and get a windsurfing lesson with Upwind Sports. We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 5bis Freestyle Sharjah, UAE
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the UAE for the traditional season-decider in Sharjah where the 2019 world championship will decide over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in all four categories: Ski Division GP1, Ski Ladies GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. In this episode, it is time for the Freestyle and Runabout GP1 categories to shine. Discover what will happen in the 2019 world championship!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: The 2020 season has arrived. Jet skies fly across the water in this race only for the bravest. The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship sees elite riders compete on cutting edge equipment. Now, the challenge is on for another year and riders are determined to earn the podium. Watch the season preview, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Screen Heroes - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are in Ericeira in Portugal, Europe's first surfing reserve and a magnet for tourists and surfers from all over the world. While we enjoy the Portuguese sun before heading over to the festival, we leave you a preview of the first film: Otelo Burning, a South African drama that yields a different perspective from professional surfing. Let's dive in!

programme.title: Screen Heroes - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome back to Screen Heroes, the show that travels the globe and visits the most important surfing festivals in the world! We are in London, and before we find out more about the British surf scene we are going to check out the capital. Are you ready to see what London has in stock for us?

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2014
programme.desc: The annual event to discover the nautical novelties of the coming season. A showcase of close to 785 exhibitors and 1,300 brands for an attendance of over 240,000 visitors, 1200 boats on display including nearly 200 new features!

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this first episode of Inside Superyachts we meet with the Godfather of Superyacht builders – Feadship Yachts. Established in 1849, this Dutch shipyard is not only the number one in the industry but also the most famous of all superyacht builders, having created masterpieces for the likes of Steve Jobs.From the Netherlands we take a trip down to the ultra-discreet Principality of Monaco, host of the greatest yacht show in the world ‘The Monaco Yacht Show’. Then, we travel thousands of feet below the sea, exploring the vast ocean with Triton Submarines, utilized by some of films greatest names such as film director James Cameron and presenter David Attenborough.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 2
programme.desc: From the Godfather of builders to the Grandaddy of designers we visit the studio of Bannenberg & Rowell to unveil the legend that is the late great Jon Bannenberg. Following the winds of change we discuss the growing demand for explorer yachts. We meet London based H2 Design, and learn about the groundbreaking 107m explorer M/Y Ulysses.We continue our theme with EYOS Explorer and DAMEN yachts, the largest and most prolific ship builder on the planet.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. The long sandy beaches and good weather conditions are placing Pingtan second most touristic island of China and if you combine its good winds, Pingtan makes perfect venue for Kiteboarding!

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep5 - Kayaking the Okefenokee National Wildlife Refuge
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the alligator-filled waters of the 438,000 acre Okefenokee swamp in Georgia.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep6 - Great Family Adventure - West Virginia
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman & Emily Jackson and family set out on an adventure-filled road trip from Rock Island, Tennessee to West Virginia.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Lee Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to the Lee Valley White Water Centre just outside London for the World Cup 1 of the ICF Canoe Slalom. We will be talking you through the action of this competition: it is going to be canoe single men followed by the kayak single women. Follow us for slalom competition at its highest level. Relive the best moments in Lee Valley 2019.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode of Road to Bermuda, we celebrate International Woman’s Day by uncovering some of the most inspirational and influential ladies in sailing to date. We have plenty of action from the M32 series, and we watch as some of our favourite AC sailors are taken hostage by the pirates of Bermuda, on board the Spirit of Bermuda. Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6

We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

programme.title: RKJ Sailing Legend
programme.desc: Born in Putney, London, Sir William Robert Patrick Knox-Johnston served in the Merchant Navy, where he acquired his skills to later on become a British legend and be awarded the title of Sir.RKJ Sailing Legend is a 56-minute documentary about possibly the most famous sailor in modern times, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston. RKJ was the first man to sail non-stop and alone around the world back in 1969: Now on the 50th anniversary of his achievement, we want to rememorate his feat.Get on board RKJ Sailing Legend, the remarkable story of Knox-Johnston's voyage around the world and into history. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this first episode of Inside Superyachts we meet with the Godfather of Superyacht builders – Feadship Yachts. Established in 1849, this Dutch shipyard is not only the number one in the industry but also the most famous of all superyacht builders, having created masterpieces for the likes of Steve Jobs.From the Netherlands we take a trip down to the ultra-discreet Principality of Monaco, host of the greatest yacht show in the world ‘The Monaco Yacht Show’. We meet London based H2 Design, and learn about the groundbreaking 107m explorer M/Y Ulysses.We continue our theme with EYOS Explorer and DAMEN yachts, the largest and most prolific ship builder on the planet.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: The 2020 season has arrived. Jet skies fly across the water in this race only for the bravest. The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship sees elite riders compete on cutting edge equipment. Now, the challenge is on for another year and riders are determined to earn the podium. Watch the season preview, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Transat Jacques Vabre 2021: Review
programme.desc: Welcome to the 15th edition of the Transat Jacques Vabre! Injecting a fresh change, sailors will be bound for Martinique as they explore for the first time the West Indies. The four participating classes have taken different routes: while the Class 40 sailed starboard in Cape Verde, the Imocas and Ocean Fifty's starboarded in Fernando de Noronha and the Ultimes in Trinidade and Martim Vaz. This edition has proven to be tougher than usual, and with several accidents taking place during the competition not all parting boats have made it to the Caribbean island. Watch the review of the Transat Jacques Vabre 2021 on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: PaddleSUP Mission Amazon
programme.desc: Charlie Head will attempt the first ever stand-up paddle boarding of the main water source of the Amazon, the Rio Marañón in Peru. It’s never been attempted before and will be the most arduous and longest SUP journey ever made.Two months of using just his physical and mental strength, Charlie will overcome extreme terrain, trek around impassable river rock falls, survive freezing waters, high altitude, swarms of insects and suspicious local tribes.However, all the hardships will be worth it if he can help shine some light on one of the planet’s most endangered environments and educates us on conservation as over 20 new dams are planned to be constructed on the river's free-flowing stretches. This could have, according to scientists, drastic consequences on the Amazon basin forever.If Charlie does not embark on this adventure now, he may never be able to do so. Find out more with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Review
programme.desc: To date, the VENDÉE GLOBE is the only solo sailing race around the world that is non-stop and without assistance. The event followed in the wake of the Golden Globe that initiated the first circumnavigation of this type via the three capes (Good Hope, Leeuwin and Horn) in 1968.44,996 kilometres, or 24,296 miles. That is the circumference of the Earth. The Vendée Globe accomplishes in 74 days this planetary voyage as participants sail down the Atlantic, across the Indian and face the challenges of the Pacific Ocean. The public refer to this arduous competition as the Everest of the seas, and this 9th edition will see 33 contenders depart from Les Sables-d’ Olonne to take part in a life changing competition.In this year's edition, sailors had to overcome storms, take advantage of high winds and competition has never been this close at the end as three skippers that are just 60 miles apart rush to cross the finish line first.Who ended up getting proclaimed the champion of one of the hardest sailing races in the world? Find it out on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Lee Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to the Lee Valley White Water Centre just outside London for the World Cup 1 of the ICF Canoe Slalom. programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: When a young actress (Janet Gaynor) arrives in Hollywood with hopes of stardom, a chance encounter places her under the wing of older actor Norman Maine (Fredric March). Adopting the stage name Vicki Lester, she co-stars with Norman in a major motion picture, but his success is clearly fading even as her career begins. After the couple wed, Vicki's fame continues to grow, but Norman descends into alcoholism, and she must decide between pursuing her dream and caring for him.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.desc: A couple in financial distress find GPS coordinates that supposedly lead to a fortune in stolen gold. Desperate for the money, they team up with two hitchhikers to enter a remote winter wilderness to recover the loot.

programme.title: A Beautiful Life
programme.desc: On the rough streets of Los Angeles, an unlikely romance is born when Maggie, a down-on-her-luck runaway, meets a kindhearted illegal immigrant, David, trying to make a new home away from El Salvador as a nightclub busboy.

programme.title: Craigslist Joe
programme.desc: With only a laptop computer, cell phone, toothbrush and the clothes on his back, Joseph Garner sets out to survive for 31 days solely on items gleaned from Craigslist.

programme.title: For Your Height Only
programme.desc: A diminutive secret agent (Weng Wang) uses his skills with guns and gun molls to rescue a kidnapped scientist.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Lance returns to coaching softball and is saddled with the 10-and-under team. As he teaches the girls the basics, he is forced to ride herd over their delusional parents, whose horrible behaviour threatens to ruin the experience for their children.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - The L-sit
programme.desc: Continue your strength progression with Kino. Work on the key elements for L-sits by practicing forward folds, core strengthening drills, and lift ups. End the class by putting all the pieces together to practice the movements required to lift up into L-sits.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Yoga Is Gratitude
programme.desc: A grateful heart is a yogis heart! Today the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A. Begin with a moment of meditation and then flow through a warm up sequence that will calm the mind and guide you towards appreciation of the gifts of breath and life. Cultivate a sense of open, thankful awareness as we approach the extended side angle position, stretching the psoas and creating a sense of openness in the hips.

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Kino and Joseph Armstrong - A Story of Addiction
programme.desc: Get to know Joseph Armstrong, where he’s from and how he came to yoga.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: Naturally Bliss Trailer

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Paschimottanasana
programme.desc: Begin with awareness of breath and body sensation in this gentle yoga class. You will find yourself present and relaxed by the end of this forward folding focused sequence.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Patience
programme.desc: For many of us, patience does not come naturally. this class brings us an opportunity to understand patience through the twisting posture Marichasana C. Join Kino as she guides you into embodiment through breath awareness and gentle movement. Be patient and kind with your body as you move into the practice and a deeper twist through the spinal axis.

programme.title: Yoga Is Stillness
programme.desc: One of the key lessons of yoga is stillness, known as Nirodaha in Sanskrit. We will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity. This class will help you build a strong base and increase awareness in the parts of your body that will support this inversion, especially the core. Don’t be afraid as we approach this challenge, Kino will offer variations so that all levels can experience the meditative stillness of headstand.

programme.title: Yoga, Money & Conscious Living With Sandy Fernandez
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Sandy Fernandez, founder of Karmic Currency.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Yoga Is Love
programme.desc: Today's practice is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Lolasana
programme.desc: This flow uses a chair supported sun salutation to get you started then flows through standing poses before finishing up with some accessible work in the arm balance Lolasana

programme.title: The Pelvic Floor - Forgive
programme.desc: The journey of yoga is a journey of deep intimacy with the body. In this class you will begin to explore the pelvic floor and the concept of forgiveness. Allow the natural intelligence of the inner body to shine cultivate of deep awareness of the intimate, inner space of the body in this 30 minute practice.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Yoga Is Love
programme.desc: Today's practice is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Lolasana
programme.desc: This flow uses a chair supported sun salutation to get you started then flows through standing poses before finishing up with some accessible work in the arm balance Lolasana

programme.title: The Pelvic Floor - Forgive
programme.desc: The journey of yoga is a journey of deep intimacy with the body. In this class you will begin to explore the pelvic floor and the concept of forgiveness. Allow the natural intelligence of the inner body to shine cultivate of deep awareness of the intimate, inner space of the body in this 30 minute practice.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga and Indian Culture with Ajay Tokas
programme.desc: In this episode of seek up, Kino sits down to talk with level 2 authorized yoga teacher, Ajay Tokas.

programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Healing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a Yoga Nidra practice is designed to promote healing in the body from the inside out.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Is Breath
programme.desc: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self. This class uses chair pose to explore both physical embodiment and to fuel our inner journey into yoga. Join us for a practice that will bring awareness into your hips and legs, using props to support the postures where needed. Let Kino guide you into a stronger awareness of Agni, the inner fire that burns through impurities and helps the mind see clearer.

programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Material relationships
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body. Cultivate equanimity as you notice the rise and fall of physical and emotional feelings. Let Kino help you drop down beneath the frequency of thought, where you can get in touch with your innate wholeness. Work with understanding your natural completeness, as you explore concepts of attachment and aversion. Find yourself in alignment with faith, breaking the inertia of limiting beliefs and thoughts. Practice towards a state of non attachment, a fertile ground in which to plant the seeds of a happier, more peaceful life.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Connecting to the Soul
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with Koya Webb about her southern roots and her California life.

programme.title: Avocado Fudge Brownies

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Drills Trailer

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Healing and Happiness
programme.desc: Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, feeling the breath and sensation in the body as a way of cultivating inward focus. Shift into a contemplative state, settling the mind below the frequency of thought. Learn to label inner processes in a way that will help you understand the nature of thought and emotion. As the quality of your awareness shifts deeper, Kino will skillfully guide you into a state of contemplation. This practice will help you process emotion and move towards healing and happiness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - How to quiet our mind
programme.desc: True peace is something that exists inside of you at all times, but the only way to access this peace is by learning to quiet the mind. So how do you do it? Watch the video to find out!

programme.title: Parsvottanasana
programme.desc: This 20 minute practice starts with the basics, building a connection to breath and body. Flow through standing poses that build up to a prop supported variation of Parsvottanasana.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: All Season's Greetings
programme.desc: Celebrate EVERYTHING throughout the fall and into the holidays with the help of the seasonal décor, entertaining essentials, home fragrance and more you'll find during All Season's Greetings.

programme.title: House to Home by Valerie - Harvest Edition
programme.desc: Experience the simple joys of living, loving and celebrating in a space that is distinctly you with fall-inspired accents, entertaining essentials, furnishings, and more from QVC's resident home dr and hospitality expert, Valerie Parr Hill. Tune in to House to Home by Valerie - Harvest Edition, and let her show you how little changes can make a big difference. Transform your ordinary rooms, corners and living spaces into a work of the heart with warm and welcoming harvest dr and easy, affordable ideas to bring the colors of the season to every room. From your front door to your fireplace mantel to every space in between, Valerie has seasonal ideas for mini-makeovers throughout your home. Share your photos and videos of the ways Valerie has brightened up your home, and see how customers just like you have transformed their spaces during House to Home by Valerie - Harvest Edition.

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Martin Riese
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.

programme.title: Dishin' It - Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Pull up a chair and get ready to dig into the tastiest talk show because these foodies are Dishin’ It out! Pull up to the most popular potluck in town where our hungry hosts are bringing you the beginner-friendly recipes they’ve been craving—as well as the how-tos, brands, and products you need to serve them up yourself! It’s a full course meal featuring food, fun, and friends. Watch and shop, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: David's Recipe Corner - Country Seafood Boil
programme.desc: If you’re a fan of the recipes on In the Kitchen with David® or an avid reader of Program Host David Venable’s best-selling cookbooks, David’s Recipe Corner is the place for you! Every month, grab your apron and watch, shop, and cook along with QVC's Resident Foodie as he guides you through step-by-step recipes that are as easy to make as they are delicious—PLUS the brands that make preparing them a breeze. And it’s all streaming free, only on QVC+.

programme.title: Chef Emeril Lagasse
programme.desc: Kick it up a notch in the kitchen with Chef Emeril's cookware, appliances, cutlery and food.

programme.title: QVC(R) Customer Choice(R) Beauty Awards Nominees
programme.desc: We're dedicated to bringing you the very best in beauty, and we love hearing what you have to say about your favorite beauty products and brands. That's why we're highlighting the nominees in dozens of categories, like cosmetics, hair care, skin care, and tools/devices, during our annual QVC Customer Choice Beauty Awards. Learn tips and tricks from our beauty experts, find out how to vote for your favorites on QVC.com and the QVC apps, and shop this year's nominees of our QVC Customer Choice Beauty Awards.

programme.desc: null

programme.title: Now That's Cooking! - Birthday Celebration Celebration 072218
programme.desc: Hungry for deliciously simple cooking ideas and kitchen must-haves? We got 'em and we're sharing!

programme.title: Hairdo by HairUWear
programme.desc: Have the hair you always wanted in minutes with hairdo -- easy-to-use, affordable, clip-in hair extensions, wigs, bangs and bands for a virtually undetectable look. Available in both synthetic and fine, human hair, these pieces offer endless possibilities in a variety of shades and styles, so you can change your hair as often as you change your mind. Whether you're looking to add color, texture, volume or length, choose hairdo on QVC.

programme.title: Mark Peters & Friends
programme.desc: Join QVC® guest Mark Peters - NYDJ Director of Consumer Experience - and his stylish sidekicks for a show filled with fashion, friendship and fun.

programme.title: In the Kitchen with David(R) -Holiday Food Edition
programme.desc: QVC's Resident Foodie and Best Selling Cookbook Author shares his enthusiasm for food, fun, and everything a home cook needs to create great meals and memories

programme.title: Kansas City Steak Company
programme.desc: Since 1932, the Kansas City Steak Company has been providing some of the best steaks money can buy to many of the finest steak houses across the country. That same superior quality is available through QVC and can be delivered right to your door. Taste the difference Kansas City Steaks can make in your next meal.

programme.title: True Botanicals - Beauty
programme.desc: Luxurious skincare formulas backed by measured results

programme.title: Joan Rivers Classic Collections
programme.desc: As a fashion authority, entertainment icon, and one of America's best-dressed women, Joan Rivers left an indelible mark on the fashion world. Today, David Dangle, three-time Emmy® Award-winning designer and Joan's creative partner of 25 years continues the brand's legacy of great quality and style with fresh design inspirations. And Bitsy Jennings, on-air guest and style expert, engages the customer with her fashion know-how and inspires women to build chic and confident looks with the Joan Rivers Classics Collection of fabulous fashion jewelry, accessories, and fashion.

programme.title: Halloween Boo-Tacular
programme.desc: We're scaring up a hair-raising selection of holiday essentials during our Halloween Boo-tacular. Tune in for a haunted houseful of decorating ideas. Whether you're hosting a party or handing out treats, get in the spirit with QVC®, your holiday headquarters for hard-to-find Halloween essentials.

programme.title: David's Great Big Christmas
programme.desc: There's no bigger fan of Christmas than our own Program Host David Venable. And if there's one thing David loves about Christmas, it's great, big, oversized decorations. Tune in to David's Great Big Christmas for illuminated indoor and outdoor designs, inflatables, oversized tabletop dr and more. Make this your biggest and best holiday yet with David's Great Big Christmas.

programme.title: LOGO by Lori Goldstein
programme.desc: New York's Lori Goldstein is one of the most influential fashion stylists in the industry, having worked with leading photographers, top fashion magazines and legendary designers over the last three decades. Known as the "insider's insider," Lori brings her impeccable taste and eclectic sense of style to QVC® with LOGO by Lori Goldstein® - a collection of contemporary separates and accessories inspired by Lori's unparalleled imagination and her keen ability to set the trends. Let Lori show you how to let your personal style shine through and love how you look as she shares her signature collection of fashion, footwear, handbags and accessories. Add some star-power to your wardrobe and have fun with fashion when you wear LOGO by Lori Goldstein.

Effortlessly dress up or dress down for every occasion in this quality, easy-care collection, and fill your closet to make styling your inner "Denim Diva" easier than ever. You're sure to have fun shopping the latest styles in figure-flattering fits from one of our largest apparel brands. Once you try Denim & Co., you'll love the way you look every day.

programme.title: Wicker Park - Indoor & Outdoor Faux Florals
programme.desc: Cultivating a beautiful garden can be as simple as placing an everlasting, floral piece during Wicker Park - Indoor & Outdoor Faux Florals. Whether you're looking for an easier way to beautify your home, yard or overcome the difficult task of planting in the shade, Wicker Park offers elevated faux floral pieces that can be scaled for any nook, cranny, patio, or planter. From plant bed fillers, to hanging baskets, potted arrangements, greenery and more, Wicker Park - Indoor & Outdoor Faux Florals offers a vibrant alternative for your home and garden endeavors.

programme.title: Breaking Barriers
programme.desc: In a world where faith and mental health often intersect, "Breaking Barriers: Seeking Help for Mental Health" aims to shatter the stigma surrounding accessing resources for your mental health. This powerful documentary delves into the misconception that reaching out for professional help is a sign of weakness, emphasizing that true healing often requires a blend of faith, prayer, and professional support. Through heartfelt interviews with mental health professionals, spiritual leaders, and individuals who have faced mental health challenges, the documentary paints a vivid picture of hope and resilience. Viewers will hear personal stories of struggle and triumph, learn from those who have lost loved ones to suicide, and discover actionable solutions to combat the ongoing mental health crisis in our communities.

programme.desc: In a world where faith and mental health often intersect, "Breaking Barriers: Seeking Help for Mental Health" aims to shatter the stigma surrounding accessing resources for your mental health. This powerful documentary delves into the misconception that reaching out for professional help is a sign of weakness, emphasizing that true healing often requires a blend of faith, prayer, and professional support. Through heartfelt interviews with mental health professionals, spiritual leaders, and individuals who have faced mental health challenges, the documentary paints a vivid picture of hope and resilience. programme.title: Temples Dot The Land
programme.desc: Utah will soon have 28 operating temples. Some are still under construction, restoration or in the Open House period. A few have recently been dedicated. In this program, we will focus on the 14 newest temples in Utah by telling the stories of the people connected to them. We will also provide a historic look at the other 14 currently operating temples. We will bring you the words of leaders of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints about this unprecedented time in temple building and what it says about the faith and worthiness of Church members who live in Utah.

programme.title: Breaking Barriers
programme.desc: In a world where faith and mental health often intersect, "Breaking Barriers: Seeking Help for Mental Health" aims to shatter the stigma surrounding accessing resources for your mental health. This powerful documentary delves into the misconception that reaching out for professional help is a sign of weakness, emphasizing that true healing often requires a blend of faith, prayer, and professional support. Through heartfelt interviews with mental health professionals, spiritual leaders, and individuals who have faced mental health challenges, the documentary paints a vivid picture of hope and resilience. Viewers will hear personal stories of struggle and triumph, learn from those who have lost loved ones to suicide, and discover actionable solutions to combat the ongoing mental health crisis in our communities.

programme.desc: In a world where faith and mental health often intersect, "Breaking Barriers: Seeking Help for Mental Health" aims to shatter the stigma surrounding accessing resources for your mental health. This powerful documentary delves into the misconception that reaching out for professional help is a sign of weakness, emphasizing that true healing often requires a blend of faith, prayer, and professional support. Through heartfelt interviews with mental health professionals, spiritual leaders, and individuals who have faced mental health challenges, the documentary paints a vivid picture of hope and resilience. programme.title: Temples Dot The Land
programme.desc: Utah will soon have 28 operating temples. Some are still under construction, restoration or in the Open House period. A few have recently been dedicated. In this program, we will focus on the 14 newest temples in Utah by telling the stories of the people connected to them. We will also provide a historic look at the other 14 currently operating temples. We will bring you the words of leaders of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints about this unprecedented time in temple building and what it says about the faith and worthiness of Church members who live in Utah.
